Toggle theme

DUI Components

Accordion

Single mode (default)

Is it accessible? Yes. It adheres to the WAI-ARIA design pattern. Is it styled? Yes. It comes with default styles via the theme system. Is it animated? Yes. It uses height transitions with reduced-motion support.

Multiple mode

First section Multiple items can be open at once. Second section This one starts open too. Third section Try opening all three.

Disabled

Disabled globally You cannot open this. Disabled per-item Only this item is disabled. This one works This item is enabled.

Button

Default Secondary Destructive Outline Ghost Link
Small Medium Large
Rounded Disabled Link button

Switch

Default
Default checked
Disabled
Read only

Badge

Default Secondary Destructive Outline Success Warning Info
